name: apexvip-web
description: ApexVIP web frontend — TypeScript + Vite. Typed callable client over the shared functions contract; the migration on-ramp for the single-file HTML apps.

scripts.test: node --test --experimental-strip-types src/concierge/intent.test.ts src/payments/pricing.test.ts src/payments/checkout.test.ts src/payouts/ledger.test.ts src/payouts/onboarding.test.ts
